small.name: Typical Flex / Light Industrial
small.notes: Single-tenant flex space with small office component and warehouse/shop

medium.name: Prologis Georgetown Crossroads
medium.notes: Multi-story urban distribution center with last-mile logistics

large.name: Amazon BFI4 Fulfillment Center
large.notes: Large-scale e-commerce fulfillment with mezzanines and automation

space_library.name: Office / Admin Area
notes: Typically 5-20% of total SF; often on mezzanine overlooking warehouse floor

space_library.name: Main Entry / Lobby
notes: Visitor check-in; separate from truck/dock access

space_library.name: Warehouse / Storage Floor
notes: 28-40 ft clear height; ESFR sprinklers for high-pile; racking systems; consider column grid 50x50 min

space_library.name: Manufacturing / Production Floor
notes: Heavy power; compressed air; process piping; overhead cranes typical; floor drains; vibration isolation

space_library.name: Loading / Receiving
notes: Dock height 48 in; dock levelers; shelters; 130 ft truck court depth; 1 dock per 10,000 SF typical

space_library.name: Shipping / Staging Area
notes: Adjacent to outbound docks; conveyors in high-volume; QC checkpoint

space_library.name: Receiving / Inbound Staging
notes: Separate from shipping when possible; QC inspection zone

space_library.name: Quality Control / Lab
notes: Climate controlled; lab sinks; testing equipment; clean environment

space_library.name: Tool Crib / Maintenance Shop
notes: Secure storage; inventory management; workbench area

space_library.name: Break Room / Lunchroom
notes: Microwave, refrigerator, vending; separate from production for food safety

space_library.name: Restrooms
notes: IBC fixture counts; consider shower for manufacturing; distribute near work zones

space_library.name: Locker Room / Changing Area
notes: Shower facilities for manufacturing/dirty work; PPE storage

space_library.name: Main Mechanical
notes: Warehouse may be unheated/uncooled; office areas conditioned; process HVAC separate

space_library.name: Electrical Room
notes: Heavy power for manufacturing; transformer vault; NEC clearances; consider backup generator

space_library.name: IT / Server Room
notes: WMS/ERP servers; UPS; dedicated cooling; near office area

plan_archetypes.notes: Shed for clear-span warehouse; support bar for offices along one side
